patch.value:
GitHub: https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/455

## Problem
`pm health` auto-detected Ollama embeddings and selected qwen3-embedding:0.6b without checking it is installed, then attempted a vector refresh that failed (Embedding request failed 404). Health exits ok but emits a noisy, hard-to-action refresh warning.

## Proposed fix
Auto-detection must only select an INSTALLED embedding model (query ollama tags), otherwise skip vector refresh with a clear remediation (ollama pull <model> / pm config set search keys); health output states which model was chosen and why.

## Definition of done
Health never attempts refresh with an unavailable model; remediation hint names the exact pull/config command; spec covers missing-model path with mocked provider.
GH-455: pm health auto-selects an uninstalled Ollama embedding model then fails vector refresh

Dogfood GH-455: health auto-detected qwen3-embedding:0.6b without checking installation and the vector refresh failed 404 with a noisy warning. Duplicate check: searched embedding auto-detect — pm-wt0g/pm-xutw (closed) cover migration/reindex, not detection; no open overlap.
Embedding auto-detection only selects installed models; unavailable-model path skips refresh with exact pull/config remediation; mocked-provider spec covers the 404 path

author: codex-agent
message: Bundle Ollama installed-model auto-default hardening with vector-store path fix

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Implementation start: live duplicate-safe search found pm-aems as canonical GH-455 item related to the current health/vectorization lane. Root cause confirmed in semantic-defaults: auto-discovery falls back to qwen3-embedding when ollama list has no installed embedding model, which can make health refresh attempt a model that is not installed.

value.note: Require installed embedding model discovery before applying Ollama auto-defaults

patch.value: Surface skipped Ollama auto-default reason and exact remediation in vectorization health details

value.note: Require installed embedding model discovery before applying Ollama auto-defaults
Regression coverage for missing/non-embedding/header-only ollama list outputs
Ollama auto-default missing-model and health detail regression coverage

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Evidence: removed implicit fallback to qwen3-embedding when ollama list does not report an installed embedding model; health vectorization details now expose auto_ollama_defaults_skipped_reason=no_installed_embedding_model and remediation 'ollama pull qwen3-embedding:0.6b' or explicit config. Linked test passed; full coverage passed 264 files / 5436 tests / 100% statements branches functions lines; security scan and audit clean.

patch.value: Ollama semantic auto-defaults now apply only when a configured/env model or installed embedding model is available; health exposes a skipped reason and remediation when none is found.
Embedding auto-detection only selects installed models and unavailable-model health paths skip refresh with exact pull/config remediation.
semantic-defaults and health regression tests passed; health details include no_installed_embedding_model and ollama pull qwen3-embedding:0.6b remediation; full coverage passed 100/100/100/100.
Fixed Ollama auto-default model selection so health does not pick unavailable embedding models

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Review follow-up: applied Cubic/Gemini remediation wording improvement so health tells users to configure providers.ollama.model explicitly, with search.embedding_model framed as an optional override. Focused tests passed after the change: semantic-defaults, search-provider-store-selection, and health-command (93/93), plus pnpm typecheck.
